pre_execution_policy_gate.evidence: Monitor Mode /api/gateway/plan-check returned decision allow with requestHash and auditToken.

risk_classification.evidence: gateway_tools risk field controls execution mode and approval requirements.

human_approval_gate.evidence: Approval-token pattern exists; full reviewer UI workflow is available in finance governance but not yet generalized across all gateway tools.

customer_api_key_custody_avoidance.evidence: Monitor Mode lets customer runtime execute after DSG decision without DSG holding customer API keys.

connector_execution.evidence: custom_http provider executed /api/gateway/webhook/inbox and returned HTTP 200.

audit_hash_proof.evidence: requestHash and recordHash returned in Gateway Mode and Monitor Mode commit.

failure_closed_behavior.evidence: Monitor plan-check hotfix fails closed if monitor event is not persisted. Provider failures return block.

public_reproducible_benchmark.evidence: npm run benchmark:gateway produces JSON and markdown benchmark artifacts.
